title: ProfileV1
description: A device-class profile consumed by @mochi.js/consistency. Declares the deterministic capabilities of a single (hardware, OS, browser) class. Instantiated for a specific seed by deriveMatrix() to produce a MatrixV1. See PLAN.md §6.1.
$comment: wreqPreset is DEPRECATED in 0.7 and removed entirely in 0.8. The runtime no longer reads the field; the `Session.fetch` path routes through Chromium's network stack via CDP, so JA4/JA3/H2 are real Chrome by definition. Kept in `required` for one release for backwards-compatibility with any out-of-tree consumer.

version.description: Semver version of this profile document.

engine.description: JS engine family. v1 invariant: chromium-only (PLAN.md I-4, decision #4).

name.description: Branded browser name. v1: chromium-family only.

minVersion.description: Inclusive lower bound on the Chromium-for-Testing major version this profile is verified against.

maxVersion.description: Inclusive upper bound on the Chromium-for-Testing major version this profile is verified against.

version.description: OS marketing version, e.g. '14' for macOS Sonoma.

cores.description: Logical core count exposed to navigator.hardwareConcurrency.

memoryGB.description: Physical RAM in GiB. navigator.deviceMemory caps at 8.

display.description: Display geometry surfaced via window.screen / matchMedia / visualViewport.

gpu.description: GPU identity surfaced via WebGL/WebGPU. Locks the canvas/webgl/webgpu render-hash chain.

audio.description: AudioContext capabilities surfaced via OfflineAudioContext / AudioContext.

fonts.description: Installed-font inventory used for font enumeration probes.

languages.description: navigator.languages ordered list. First entry must match `locale`.

tremor.description: Per-axis Gaussian jitter amplitude, in pixel-equivalents.

wpm.description: Mean typing speed in words per minute.

wreqPreset.description: DEPRECATED in 0.7 — removed entirely in 0.8. The runtime no longer reads this field; `Session.fetch` routes through Chromium's network stack via CDP, so JA4 is real Chrome by definition. Kept in the schema for one release for migration. Historical: preset name accepted by the wreq Rust crate (e.g. 'chrome_131_macos').

userAgent.description: Full navigator.userAgent string this profile spoofs.

uaCh.description: User-Agent Client Hints (sec-ch-ua, sec-ch-ua-platform, etc.). Headers as observed on the wire.

entropyBudget.description: Declares which fields are device-fixed vs. seed-varying. PLAN.md §6.1.

fixed.description: Dotted paths into this profile that are constants across all seeds.

perSeed.description: Dotted paths that resolve deterministically per (profile, seed) within the profile's declared bounds.
